name: Watsonville Community Hospital
message: Founded in 1895, Watsonville Community Hospital is a 106-bed, acute care facility accredited by The Joint Commission. In addition to the emergency department that serves as an advanced life support base station for Santa Cruz County, the hospital offers a comprehensive portfolio of medical and surgical services, including a full service Wound Treatment Center. The physicians and staff at Watsonville Community Hospital strive to exceed patient expectations, while delivering compassionate, quality care.
